metadata.description: College directory derived from course.json. Each college is deduplicated and contains all specializations it offers.

schema.name: Full canonical college name
schema.location_tag: Normalized location tag (delhi, noida, ghaziabad, greater_noida)
schema.type: Government / Private Deemed / Private Affiliated / etc.
schema.facilities: Union of all facilities across specializations
schema.placements: Best placement stats across all specializations
schema.top_recruiters: Union of all recruiters across specializations
schema.specializations_offered: Array of all courses/specializations this college appears in, each with its own fees, entrance exams, eligibility, rank, traits and career paths
